summary.de: Sicherheit stack-agnostisch im Blueprint; Living Memory und GitHub-Pages-Viewer.
summary.en: Stack-agnostic security in Blueprint; living memory and GitHub Pages viewer.

versions.mermaid:
%% VisuDEV architecture overview (bootstrap, needs-review)
flowchart TB
  subgraph ui [Frontend Vite React]
    Shell[Shell]
    Projects[Projects]
    AppFlow[App Flow]
    Blueprint[Blueprint Views]
    Data[Data ERD]
    Settings[Settings]
  end

  subgraph analysis [Analysis]
    LocalEngine[Local Engine]
    Graph[Software Graph]
    AC[Access Control Analyzers]
    Enrich[Blueprint Enrichment]
  end

  subgraph runtime [Runtime]
    Preview[Preview Runner]
    Supabase[Supabase Edge + Auth]
  end

  Shell --> Projects
  Shell --> AppFlow
  Shell --> Blueprint
  Shell --> Data
  Shell --> Settings
  Projects --> LocalEngine
  Projects --> Supabase
  LocalEngine --> Graph
  Graph --> Enrich
  Graph --> AC
  Enrich --> Blueprint
  AC --> Blueprint
  AppFlow --> Preview

summary.de: Blueprint wird zur Architektur-Röntgenaufnahme mit mehreren Views und einem gemeinsamen Graphen.
summary.en: Blueprint becomes an architecture X-ray with multiple views and a shared graph.

summary.de: Bevor Blueprint viele Views hatte: Projekte, App Flow und Preview im Vordergrund.
summary.en: Before multi-view Blueprint: projects, App Flow, and preview front and center.
